creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
After upgrade of port x11/xorg to v7.5 xorg does not start any more.
I didn't changed the configuration "/etc/X11/xorg.conf". 
Also I tried to create a new configuration file by using "Xorg -configure", but I could not see any relevant differences between my old config file and the new created file.

Further I removed all installed ports, cleaned /usr/local and /var/db/ports and installed all ports new from scratch.
But the problem is still there.

For further details please check the attached config file and logs.

Fix: n/a

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use a pc with a Radeon X850XT-PE and xorg-7.5 installed.
Try to start xorg from console via startx by using my attached xorg.conf.

The problem is always there when I want to start xorg on my pc.
